channel.title: Posts on Lumen — Surface Pro Linux Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Lumen — Surface Pro Linux Hub

item.title: Best USB-C Docks for Surface Pro on Linux (2026)
item.description: Top USB-C and Thunderbolt 4 docks for Surface Pro on Linux. Anker, CalDigit, and Plugable tested with Ubuntu 24.04.

item.title: Surface Pro Linux Setup Guide: Complete 2026 Tutorial
item.description: Step-by-step Surface Pro Linux setup for 2026. Install Ubuntu, fix drivers, configure battery, WiFi, and pen input from scratch.

item.title: Best Linux Distros for Surface Pro in 2026
item.description: Ubuntu, Fedora, or NixOS on your Surface Pro? We rank the best Linux distros for Surface Pro 7+ in 2026 with kernel support details.

item.title: Best Surface Pro Accessories for Linux Users (2026)
item.description: Thunderbolt docks, keyboards, and storage that actually work on Linux. Tested accessories for Surface Pro 7+ with driver details.

item.title: Surface Pro Battery Optimization on Linux (2026 Guide)
item.description: Fix Surface Pro battery drain on Linux. TLP config, power profiles, and thermald tuning to get 8+ hours on Ubuntu and Fedora.

item.title: Surface Pro Linux Tips and Tricks (2026)
item.description: Hidden Linux tricks for Surface Pro: fix WiFi drops, pen input, screen rotation, and sleep issues on Ubuntu and Fedora in 2026.

item.title: Surface Pro vs MacBook for Linux Development (2026)
item.description: Running Linux on Surface Pro vs MacBook for dev work. Real performance, battery, and compatibility comparison for 2026.
